Max row: 28, Max col: 7
Row 01: ['PEMBOBOTAN KRITERIA — METODE SWARA (Step-wise Weight Assessment Ratio Analysis)']
Row 02: ['Kj = Sj + 1  |  Qj = Qj-1 / Kj (Q1 = 1)  |  Wj = Qj / ΣQj']
